heading: Certain reinsurance agreements
label: 845 Certain reinsurance agreements
notes: Amendments2004—Subsec. (a). substituted “amount, source, or character” for “source and character” in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 108–357

children.heading: Allocation in case of reinsurance agreement involving tax avoidance or evasion
children.label: a Allocation in case of reinsurance agreement involving tax avoidance or evasion

children.text: allocate between or among such persons income (whether investment income, premium, or otherwise), deductions, assets, reserves, credits, and other items related to such agreement,

children.heading: Reinsurance contract having significant tax avoidance effect
children.label: b Reinsurance contract having significant tax avoidance effect
children.text: If the Secretary determines that any reinsurance contract has a significant tax avoidance effect on any party to such contract, the Secretary may make proper adjustments with respect to such party to eliminate such tax avoidance effect (including treating such contract with respect to such party as terminated on December 31 of each year and reinstated on January 1 of the next year).
